title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Vijay Sales

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Vijay Sales
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Vijay Sales in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijay Sales:
Vijay Sales is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
